subject: Bump minor version
commit_message:
Bump minor version

Bump minor version in preparation for Amsterdam
branching.

Issue-ID: CIMAN-120

Signed-off-by: Jeremy Phelps <jphelps@linuxfoundation.org>

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/vfc-nfvo-wfengine-master-engine-mgr-service-verify-java/57/ : FAILURE

Unable to build due to a non-resolvable parent POM. Search logs for "[FATAL] Non-resolvable parent POM" to find the logs.

The fix for this is usually to make sure your poms are pointing to parents that exist. Double check:

 * groupId is correct and no typos
 * artifactId is correct and no typos
 * version is correct for branch ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/vfc-nfvo-wfengine-master-engine-mgr-service-verify-java/57/ )
